description:
A .NET-native codebase context optimizer for AI-assisted development.

Fuse collects the source files of a .NET codebase, reduces them for token efficiency, and emits one structured payload an AI agent or a developer can read in a single call. It ships as a .NET global tool and as an MCP server.
What's Changed
- Merge release/v3.2.0 into main: 3.2.0 release + v3.3 roadmap by @litenova in #23
